justification: The question pertains to the specific market close price movement of a publicly traded stock (ALB) over a one-week period.
question:
Will ALB's market close price on 2026-04-05 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-29?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
